backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Pilot Flight Logbook backend, defining data types (Student, Instructor, Aircraft, Exercise, FlightLog, User) and CRUD operations with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that passes state through unchanged, used as the upgrade migration hook in main.mo.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (useAdminPanel hook, AdminPanel component, Admin tab in App.tsx) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Pilot Flight Logbook' that mounts the React root and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a 5- or 6-tab layout (Flight Entry, Flight Logs, Reports, Export, Manage, and a conditionally shown Admin tab with shield icon for admin users) and wiring up all major page components.
Modal dialog component for creating new Students, Instructors, Aircraft, or Exercises with per-type form fields, validation, and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component that displays system overview stats (students, instructors, aircraft, exercises) and a user management table where admins can update user roles. Restricts access to admin users only, showing an 'Access Denied' message otherwise.
frontend/src/components/EditEntityDialog: Modal dialog for editing existing entities (student, instructor, aircraft, or exercise) with type-appropriate form fields and validation. Calls the corresponding update mutation hook on submit and shows toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/EntityManagement: Tabbed management UI for students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises, each with a table listing entries and buttons to add, edit, or delete items. Uses dedicated hooks for CRUD operations and shows confirmation dialogs before deletion.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Button component that calls the backend actor to export all flight logs as a CSV file and triggers a browser download with a date-stamped filename. Shows a loading spinner during export and displays toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing a flight log entry, with fields for date, student, instructor, aircraft, exercise, flight/landing type, times, and aircraft hours. Supports both create and edit modes via separate mutation hooks, auto-populating fields when an existing log is provided.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogTable.t: Table component that lists all flight log entries with columns for date, participants, aircraft, exercise, type, times, and hours, plus edit and delete action buttons. Handles delete confirmation via an alert dialog and shows a loading spinner while data is fetching.
frontend/src/components/InstructorReport: Read-only report card that displays a table of instructors with their total flight hours, total aircraft hours, and flight count. Shows a loading spinner while data is fetching and an empty-state message if no data is available.
frontend/src/components/StudentReport.ts: React component that displays a table of student flight data (total hours and aircraft hours) fetched via the useStudentReport hook, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminPanel.ts: Collection of hooks for admin panel functionality including fetching the caller's role, listing registered users, updating user roles, and aggregating entity counts.
frontend/src/hooks/useEntities.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating core entities (students, instructors, aircraft, exercises) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useFlightLogs.ts: Hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting flight logs, with foreign-key resolution to human-readable names for students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and exposing identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: Hooks that compute student and instructor summary reports by aggregating flight log data (total hours, aircraft hours, flight count) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/utils/timeCalculations.ts: Utility functions for parsing HH:MM time strings, formatting minutes into human-readable durations, and calculating total flight hours between takeoff and landing times (including midnight crossings).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with oklch-based color tokens, Inter font, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the Pilot Flight Logbook application.
